nav-search: flex: 1; height: 34px; background: #fff; border-radius: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; overflow: hidden;
cart-badge: position: absolute; top: -4px; right: -4px; background: var(--yellow); color: var(--text); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; min-width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0 4px;
product-hero: background: #fff; padding: 10px 14px 8px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
prod-img: width: 180px; height: 180px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F5F5F5, #E8E8E8); border-radius: 4px; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
rating-row: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-top: 4px; font-size: 11px;
price-line: margin-top: 6px; display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap;
price-main: color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; font-size: 24px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.5px;
cta-stack: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; margin-top: 10px;
cta: height: 32px; border-radius: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
bought-together: margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid var(--divider); font-size: 11px; color: var(--text); font-weight: 700;
bt-tile: width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 4px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F5F5F5, #E8E8E8); border: 1px solid var(--divider); flex-shrink: 0;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500; position: relative;
tab-badge: position: absolute; top: -2px; right: 10px; background: var(--yellow); color: var(--text); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; min-width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 7px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0 3px;
btn: font-family: var(--font); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); cursor: pointer; color: var(--text);
